rationale_source: FRANCO-C01 DISPOSITION (2026-05-30): admin-sent intake is treated as broker-submitted and proceeds through NORMAL intake — NOT routed to a paused admin_handoff state and NOT requiring explicit acknowledgment first. Supersedes the original F3.AH admin-handoff-state assumption.

intake_classification.rationale: FRANCO-C01: admin-from-Franco intake classified as broker-submitted (process normally). Investigation confirmed Vienna does NOT set admin_controlled on admin intake — admin_controlled is set ONLY on the link-submission path (webhook.js:3007), never on admin-sender intake.

workflow_state.rationale: FRANCO-C01: processed as a normal broker submission (active), NOT a paused admin_handoff state. BATCH-13 actual was already 'active' — the code already implemented Franco's answer; only this spec was stale.

outbound_emails.rationale: C01's body is admin draft-feedback (not a complete broker submission), so no admin prelim on this turn — but the deal is processed (active), not paused. The Franco-ratified property is 'process normally / no admin_controlled pause', verified via workflow_state=active + the no-pause source invariant.
